line_type.solid: Representation of direct links or connections (e.g., user to internet, resource connections such as private endpoints).
line_type.single_direction_arrow: Indicates unidirectional traffic flow (e.g., egress traffic from inspection VNET firewall to AI Services Virtual Network).
line_type.bi_directional_arrow: Indicates bidirectional communication (e.g., ExpressRoute connection between On-premises network and Corporate VNET).
line_type.dashed: Represents boundary or logical grouping of services or regions (e.g., boundaries of Azure corporate subscription, DMZ subscription, etc.).

line_color.black_solid: Standard connections such as inter-resource communication (e.g., resource within VNETs).
line_color.orange_single_direction_arrow: Egress traffic (e.g., traffic flow between VNET subnets through firewalls).
line_color.blue_single_direction_arrow: Ingress traffic flow (e.g., traffic flow from Azure Firewall to various service endpoints in the AI Landing Zone).
